pattern: Count-based enumeration over frequency bins makes the O(n²) triple search reducible to O(100²) when values are bounded.
hints: Since values are small (0–100), count frequencies and enumerate triples (a, b, c) with a <= b <= c and a + b + c = target.
For each triple of value-counts, compute the combinatorial multiplicity (all-same, two-same, all-different cases differ).

edge_inputs.description: all same value summing to target

stress.description: random array of 0-100 values with random target 0-300
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = min(3000, max(3, size))
    arr = [rng.randint(0, 100) for _ in range(n)]
    target = rng.randint(0, 300)
    return [arr, target]
